leadText: Heal Order (Japanese: かいふくしれい Recovery Order) is a non-damaging Bug-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is one of the signature moves of Vespiquen, alongside Attack Order and Defend Order.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation IV 1.2 Generation V to VII 1.3 Generation VIII onwards Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Heal Order restores up to 50% of the user's maximum HP, rounded down. Generation V to VII [ edit | edit source ] Heal Order now restores 50% of the user's maximum HP, rounded up. If powered up by a Buginium Z into Z-Heal Order, all of the user's lowered stats are reset. Generation VIII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Heal Order cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E The user calls out its underlings to heal it. The user regains up to half of its max HP. Sw Sh BD SP LA S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Restores the user's HP. B S L じぶんの ＨＰをかいふくする MD GtI UNUSED S MD It restores your HP.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] In Generation VIII and IX , Heal Order is the only one of Vespiquen's signature moves that cannot be used in a battle.
